seo_data.generated_keywords: Xiaomi TV A Pro 32, Smart LED TV, HD TV, Google TV, Dolby Audio, DTS-X, Voice Control, Bluetooth Remote, Chromecast built-in, Metallic Design, Quad-core TV
seo_data.meta_title: Xiaomi TV A Pro 32: HD Smart LED TV with Google TV
seo_data.meta_description: Experience immersive viewing with the Xiaomi TV A Pro 32. Features a premium metallic frame, HD LED display, Dolby Audio, Google TV, and voice control.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The Xiaomi TV A Pro 32 redefines smart home entertainment with its blend of sleek design and advanced features. Boasting a 32-inch HD smart LED display, it delivers high-resolution images and stunning colors, complemented by an ultra-narrow bezel for an expansive, immersive viewing experience. Its exquisite metallic frame and unibody design add a touch of sophistication to any living space, ensuring both aesthetic appeal and robust build quality.
Powered by a quad-core A55 CPU with 1.5GB RAM and 8GB ROM, this smart TV ensures smooth operation and ample space for favorite applications. It integrates seamlessly with Google TV™, providing personalized content recommendations and easy access to a vast array of movies, shows, and apps. With Chromecast built-in™ and Miracast, users can effortlessly stream content from mobile devices to the larger screen, enhancing their visual enjoyment.

range_overview:
The Xiaomi TV A Pro 32 is designed to integrate smart technology with a premium viewing experience. It features a 32-inch HD smart LED display, distinguished by an ultra-narrow bezel that maximizes the screen-to-body ratio for an immersive visual journey. The television's design emphasizes elegance with a premium metallic frame and a unibody construction, making it a sophisticated addition to any home environment.
For audio, the TV is equipped with powerful 2 × 10W stereo speakers, totaling 20W, that fill the room with rich sound. It supports Dolby Audio™ and DTS-X dual decoding, producing vivid and immersive sound effects. Furthermore, DTS Virtual:X technology enhances the auditory experience by creating a three-dimensional soundscape with an overhead dimension, closely recreating a cinema-like atmosphere.
Operating on Google TV™, the Xiaomi TV A Pro 32 brings together content from various apps and subscriptions, organizing it for personalized recommendations. Voice control capabilities via Google Assistant allow users to find movies, stream apps, play music, and manage smart home devices with simple voice commands, accessible through the "Ok Google" prompt or the dedicated button on the 360° Bluetooth remote. Its robust connectivity options include 2.4GHz/5GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth 5.0, enabling seamless integration with other devices and a variety of entertainment scenarios. Under the hood, a powerful quad-core A55 CPU, paired with 1.5GB RAM and 8GB ROM, ensures fluid performance and sufficient storage for applications.
sales_arguments: Immersive HD LED display with ultra-narrow bezels and premium metallic unibody design.
Powerful 20W stereo speakers with Dolby Audio™, DTS-X, and DTS Virtual:X for a cinematic sound experience.
Integrated Google TV™ for personalized content organization, recommendations, and access to a wide range of apps.
Convenient voice control via Google Assistant and a 360° Bluetooth remote for effortless navigation and smart home integration.
Seamless content casting from mobile devices using Chromecast built-in™ and Miracast, supported by a robust quad-core A55 processor, 1.5GB RAM, and 8GB ROM.

technical_specifications.Design: Premium metallic frame, Bezel-less design, Unibody design
